bridge.title: Quality Check
bridge.description: Configurable quality assurance checks for bilingual content: whitespace, inline codes, patterns, length, characters, terminology, and LanguageTool grammar verification.

checkCharacters.title: Check Against Charset Encoding
checkCharacters.description: Warn if a target character cannot be represented in the specified character set encoding.

checkAllowedCharacters.title: Check ITS Allowed Characters
checkAllowedCharacters.description: Verify target text against the ITS Allowed Characters annotation property.

charset.title: Character Set Encoding
charset.description: Name of the character set encoding to validate against (e.g. ISO-8859-1). Leave empty to use only the regex pattern below.

extraCharsAllowed.title: Extra Allowed Characters (Regex)
extraCharsAllowed.description: Regular expression matching additional characters to allow beyond the charset. These characters pass validation even if not in the charset.

corruptedCharacters.title: Check Corrupted Characters
corruptedCharacters.description: Check for special patterns that often indicate encoding corruption (e.g. UTF-8 file opened as ISO-8859-1).

leadingWS.title: Check Leading Whitespace
leadingWS.description: Flag text units where leading whitespace differs between source and target.

trailingWS.title: Check Trailing Whitespace
trailingWS.description: Flag text units where trailing whitespace differs between source and target.

emptyTarget.title: Warn on Empty Target
emptyTarget.description: Flag segments where the target is empty when the source is not empty.

emptySource.title: Warn on Non-Empty Target with Empty Source
emptySource.description: Flag segments where the target is not empty but the source is empty.

targetSameAsSource.title: Warn on Target Same as Source
targetSameAsSource.description: Flag segments where the target translation is identical to the source. Only checked when the source contains at least one word character.

targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.title: Verify for Same Language Family
targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.description: Also apply the target-same-as-source check when source and target are in the same language family (e.g. en vs. en-GB, or fr-FR vs. fr-CA).

targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.title: Include Codes in Comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.description: Include inline codes when comparing source and target for identity. If set and the only difference is a code, the segment is not flagged.

targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.title: Include Number-Only Segments
targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.description: Include segments containing only numbers in the same-as-source comparison.

checkXliffSchema.title: Validate XLIFF Schema
checkXliffSchema.description: Validate XLIFF input documents against an XLIFF schema.

doubledWord.title: Warn on Doubled Words
doubledWord.description: Flag target segments with consecutive repeated words (e.g. "is is" in "This is is an example"). Case-insensitive.

doubledWordExceptions.title: Doubled Word Exceptions
doubledWordExceptions.description: Semicolon-separated list of words that may be repeated (e.g. "vous;nous"). Case-insensitive.

codeDifference.title: Check Code Differences
codeDifference.description: Verify that target segments have the same inline codes as source segments. Reports both missing and extra codes.

guessOpenClose.title: Guess Opening/Closing Types
guessOpenClose.description: Try to infer whether placeholder codes are opening or closing when not explicitly marked.

strictCodeOrder.title: Enforce Strict Code Order
strictCodeOrder.description: Also flag differences when codes appear in a different order between source and target.

extraCodesAllowed.title: Extra Codes Allowed
extraCodesAllowed.description: List of inline code type names that are allowed to appear in the target even if not present in the source.

missingCodesAllowed.title: Missing Codes Allowed
missingCodesAllowed.description: List of inline code type names that are allowed to be missing from the target even if present in the source.

typesToIgnore.title: Code Types to Ignore
typesToIgnore.description: Semicolon-separated list of inline code types to skip during code verification (e.g. "mrk;x-df-s;").

checkWithLT.title: Use LanguageTool
checkWithLT.description: Run grammar and style checks using a LanguageTool server. Requires a running LanguageTool instance.

serverURL.title: Server URL
serverURL.description: URL of the LanguageTool server (e.g. http://localhost:8081/).

ltBilingualMode.title: Bilingual Mode
ltBilingualMode.description: Enable bilingual mode for LanguageTool verification.

checkStorageSize.title: Check ITS Storage Size
checkStorageSize.description: Warn if a source or target text unit does not fit its ITS Storage Size property.

checkMaxCharLength.title: Check Maximum Length Ratio
checkMaxCharLength.description: Flag targets longer than a given percentage of source character length. Different percentages apply to short and long text.

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Max)
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered "long" for the maximum length check.

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Max)
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for text longer than the threshold.

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Max)
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for text at or below the threshold.

checkMinCharLength.title: Check Minimum Length Ratio
checkMinCharLength.description: Flag targets shorter than a given percentage of source character length. Different percentages apply to short and long text.

minCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Min)
minCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered "long" for the minimum length check.

minCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Min)
minCharLengthAbove.description: Minimum required percentage of source length for text longer than the threshold.

minCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Min)
minCharLengthBelow.description: Minimum required percentage of source length for text at or below the threshold.

checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.title: Check Absolute Maximum Length
checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.description: Flag target segments that exceed an absolute character count limit.

absoluteMaxCharLength.title: Absolute Maximum Characters
absoluteMaxCharLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in any target segment.

useGenericCodes.title: Use Generic Codes in Display

checkPatterns.title: Check Patterns
